raw_title: Ebson Uanguta: Environmental stewardship and gender mainstreaming for state resilience to shocks and disasters
raw_content: Remarks by Mr Eebson Uanguta, Governor of the Bank of Namibia, at the "Environmental stewardship and gender mainstreaming for state resilience to shocks and disasters" workshop, Windhoek, 26 January 2026.
generated_title: 纳米比亚央行行长谈环境管理与性别主流化增强国家韧性
generated_summary: 纳米比亚央行行长在BIS研讨会上强调环境管理与性别主流化对提升国家应对冲击和灾害韧性的重要性。
